title: Lab 21: Run A Container
description: Run a container from a prepared local image with bind mounts

tasks: Create user runner21 if it does not already exist and set its password to cinder9.
As user runner21, run a container named mycontainer21 from localhost/text2pdf21:latest with /opt/file21 bind mounted to /data/input and /opt/processed21 bind mounted to /data/output.
hints: The local image for this lab is prebuilt.
Use podman run with two bind mounts.
checks: getent passwd runner21 >/dev/null && getent shadow runner21 | awk -F: '{ok=(length($2)>0 && $2 !~ /^(!!?|\*|LK|NP)$/)} END{exit !ok}'

runuser -l runner21 -c 'podman ps --format {{.Names}}' | grep -qx mycontainer21 && runuser -l runner21 -c 'podman inspect mycontainer21 --format "{{range .Mounts}}{{.Source}}:{{.Destination}} {{end}}"' | grep -Fq '/opt/file21:/data/input' && runuser -l runner21 -c 'podman inspect mycontainer21 --format "{{range .Mounts}}{{.Source}}:{{.Destination}} {{end}}"' | grep -Fq '/opt/processed21:/data/output'
task_titles: Create runner21 and set its password
